After I questioned him on his blatant lies about NIH funding for gain of function research, Google came after me! They took down my videos that detail the entire paper trail of Fauci's involvement with funding the Wuhan lab. They called it "medical misinformation!"
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004534:6biaMZlN8:m:1:3253819041:0A900C850CA41ACB61F3502CA6561282:r)
This is ridiculous.

✅ I used basic NIH definitions of gain of function research.
✅ I provided documentation.
✅ I presented the facts.

**_And Google responds with ... censorship. _**

These are wild times, Peter. These big tech giants are willing to work as an arm of the federal government to protect the bureaucracy. **Free speech be damned.**

_Fighting for the truth has truly never been more difficult or more important._

And I need you fighting with me.

Please chip in today to fight this censorship and help me hold Dr. Fauci accountable: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2627905/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004534:6biaMZlN8:m:1:3253819041:0A900C850CA41ACB61F3502CA6561282:r)**

Rand Paul

name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004678:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004679:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004680:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004681:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58004677:6kle9ZliN:m:1:3253819041:06C5E65F7B269F49847479D020262BCD:r)**

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Betrayal
body:
The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. It’s the America-hating politicians subverting our armed forces with divisive propaganda. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c223%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GVi%2fVCHYYoWe%2fplciAn6iQ&sysid=1)
Friend, The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. _It’s the America-hating politicians subverting our armed forces with divisive propaganda._ It’s **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** -- restructuring the Pentagon’s training to revolve around the doctrines and false history of Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. It’s **Bishop Garrison** -- hand selected by Secretary Austin to lead the military’s purge of conservatives, Trump supporters and patriots like you and me. It’s **Admiral Michael Gilday** -- pitting white sailors against nonwhite sailors, citing the works of America-hating Marxist Ibram X. Kendi. It’s **General Mark Milley** -- who sided with violent Black Lives Matter terrorists that torched our cities to the ground, bowing to the Critical Race Theory dogma to keep his job when Biden took office. It’s Air Force Chief of Staff **Charles Q. Brown Jr**. (a leading candidate to replace General Milley) -- betraying his own country and branch of the military as its top enlisted leader. And it’s every last bureaucrat that appointed them, nominated them or enabled them. That’s why the Freedom Center is joining forces with the **Lt. Col. Matthew Lohmeier** -- the whistleblower that risked everything for taking a stand against anti-American, anti-white indoctrination in our military, and paying with his career. [**And that’s why I hope I can count on your support of the Freedom Center as we exhaust every resource at our disposal to save our military, and remove the military officials working in direct opposition to our nation’s values and interests.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4347%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cAwz0wOfaOMtR3y6CWcgIw&sysid=1) My name is David Horowitz, and when I was a young man, I dreamt of a day when our leaders embraced this backwards ideology -- because when I was a young man, I was a full fledged communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them, and revealing what I knew about them to the rest of the world. **And I can tell you beyond a shadow of a doubt that critical race theory is just Marxism by a new name, and any military official promoting it is a threat to our republic.** With your help, we can cut through this administration’s lies and their media lapdogs’ propaganda -- and tell the truth to the American people about what’s happening to our military on _OUR_ dime. **[Will you donate $25 or more to the Freedom Center](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4348%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WUTCB2xRkkGL45uqpKxdvg&sysid=1),** and give us the ammunition we need to publish and distribute two original pamphlets explaining what’s happening to our country in detail (one of them written by Lt. Col. Lohmeier himself), petition for the removal of treacherous leaders, and so much more? These hacks are doing our enemies’ work for them, and destroying our military from the inside out. They’re sending a loud clear message to the world that the United States isn’t united at all, but divided by race and more vulnerable than ever. **My Freedom Center has stood proudly behind our military for over 30 years --_and that’s exactly why we’re taking on their new woke leadership._** Because the twisted ideologies Joe Biden’s military leadership is pushing on our men and women in uniform is putting them -- and our country -- in immense danger. [**But as a nonprofit organization, we won’t succeed without patriots like you by our side.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4349%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fM656KechINhyW7BIAMlnQ&sysid=1) This administration and everyone associated with it projects weakness, fragility and cowardice, and our enemies are circling like vultures. Without a strong military, we’re at the mercy of our adversaries. Without a strong military, there is no America. And without America, there is no hope. _“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth.”_ _\-- Ronald Reagan_ I hope I can count on your generous support today. Sincerely, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4340%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6oAmCtqxIeXA52DeSweKXQ&sysid=1) David Horowitz P.S. Col. Matthew Lohmeier risked everything to reveal the truth to the American people about how top military officials are sabotaging our men and women in uniform, and now he’s teaming up with my Freedom Center to release one of the most important pamphlets of the decade. [**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more to the Freedom Center today?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4341%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TPa6OFqY40eM6OqZ1PgLHA&sysid=1) [**SUPPORT THE FREEDOM CENTER**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4342%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NmrTWcADssCVxPHRCDGJXA&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4343%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=37Ap5SZ2n1StKbK5rRY9Rg&sysid=1) The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support the Freedom Center](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4344%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k4eUWk3s4XeBboJVhByj2Q&sysid=1)** (C) David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.org
P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4455%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mEPOvI6YfO1SEvDg1vsDBA&sysid=1) | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4456%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0aB2bOaukQ%2fMP0jPFrmRTg&sysid=1)

clean_body: The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. It’s the America-hating politicians subverting our armed forces with divisive propaganda. Friend, The greatest threat to our military right now isn’t Russia or China. It’s Washington D.C. It’s the America-hating politicians subverting our armed forces with divisive propaganda. It’s Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin -- restructuring the Pentagon’s training to revolve around the doctrines and false history of Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project. It’s Bishop Garrison -- hand selected by Secretary Austin to lead the military’s purge of conservatives, Trump supporters and patriots like you and me. It’s Admiral Michael Gilday -- pitting white sailors against nonwhite sailors, citing the works of America-hating Marxist Ibram X. Kendi. It’s General Mark Milley -- who sided with violent Black Lives Matter terrorists that torched our cities to the ground, bowing to the Critical Race Theory dogma to keep his job when Biden took office. It’s Air Force Chief of Staff Charles Q. Brown Jr. (a leading candidate to replace General Milley) -- betraying his own country and branch of the military as its top enlisted leader. And it’s every last bureaucrat that appointed them, nominated them or enabled them. That’s why the Freedom Center is joining forces with the Lt. Col. Matthew Lohmeier -- the whistleblower that risked everything for taking a stand against anti-American, anti-white indoctrination in our military, and paying with his career. My name is David Horowitz, and when I was a young man, I dreamt of a day when our leaders embraced this backwards ideology -- because when I was a young man, I was a full fledged communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - the largest magazine of the radical Left. I marched, I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them, and revealing what I knew about them to the rest of the world. And I can tell you beyond a shadow of a doubt that critical race theory is just Marxism by a new name, and any military official promoting it is a threat to our republic. With your help, we can cut through this administration’s lies and their media lapdogs’ propaganda -- and tell the truth to the American people about what’s happening to our military on OUR dime. , and give us the ammunition we need to publish and distribute two original pamphlets explaining what’s happening to our country in detail (one of them written by Lt. Col. Lohmeier himself), petition for the removal of treacherous leaders, and so much more? These hacks are doing our enemies’ work for them, and destroying our military from the inside out. They’re sending a loud clear message to the world that the United States isn’t united at all, but divided by race and more vulnerable than ever. My Freedom Center has stood proudly behind our military for over 30 years --and that’s exactly why we’re taking on their new woke leadership. Because the twisted ideologies Joe Biden’s military leadership is pushing on our men and women in uniform is putting them -- and our country -- in immense danger. This administration and everyone associated with it projects weakness, fragility and cowardice, and our enemies are circling like vultures. Without a strong military, we’re at the mercy of our adversaries. Without a strong military, there is no America. And without America, there is no hope. “If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on earth.” \-- Ronald Reagan I hope I can count on your generous support today. Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. Col. Matthew Lohmeier risked everything to reveal the truth to the American people about how top military officials are sabotaging our men and women in uniform, and now he’s teaming up with my Freedom Center to release one of the most important pamphlets of the decade. The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. Voter suppression is happening everywhere. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32956636/297385636/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVhMjA5YS01MGVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WA_SKsEgiJqrDarpRoXmTVp8PwD3LkDTuqMHXZkMjQ=&emci=4738f2b9-f0eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=665a209a-50ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
Peter, We should _all_ be concerned about Republican attempts to block access to the ballot box. Of course, this is nothing new. For as long as activists have been fighting to expand voting rights, right-wing leaders have been doing everything possible to shut some of us out of participating in our democracy. **North Carolina’s legacy of voter suppression is a stain on our state’s history, one our administration continues to fight to make right. But now the GOP is at it again.** State Senate Republicans _just_ passed a bill that will restrict mail-in voting — and young people and communities of color will be most affected. Once again, radical Republicans are trying to pick their voters, rather than allow the _people_ to choose their representatives. **[Peter, I will always fight for your right to vote, and I want to know you’re with me. Sign our petition right now to support vote by mail in North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32956638/297385644/-1894190099?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights_072421_noheadshot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVhMjA5YS01MGVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WA_SKsEgiJqrDarpRoXmTVp8PwD3LkDTuqMHXZkMjQ=&emci=4738f2b9-f0eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=665a209a-50ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32956640/297385652/-1894190099?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights_072421_noheadshot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVhMjA5YS01MGVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WA_SKsEgiJqrDarpRoXmTVp8PwD3LkDTuqMHXZkMjQ=&emci=4738f2b9-f0eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=665a209a-50ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)

Look, access to the ballot box is the cornerstone of our democracy. It should _never_ have become a partisan issue.
But the radical wing of the Republican Party — the folks who are more concerned with staying on Donald Trump’s good side than with actually serving their constituents — are using the Big Lie to justify making it harder for _the people_ to choose their leaders.
**[We won’t stand for it here in North Carolina. Please, join with me to support mail-in voting: Add your name right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32956643/297385657/-1894190099?source=em_RC_PET_VotingRights_072421_noheadshot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVhMjA5YS01MGVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WA_SKsEgiJqrDarpRoXmTVp8PwD3LkDTuqMHXZkMjQ=&emci=4738f2b9-f0eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=665a209a-50ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)**

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Sorry to bother you on a Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We need a few more folks to chip in before midnight.
#

Hey friend,
Sorry to bother you again, but it looks like we need a few more folks to chip in before midnight, and I’m hoping you could be one of them.
Frankly, there are a lot of obstacles standing between me, a gay Black man from the North Philly projects, and winning this race to replace Pat Toomey in the U.S. Senate.
**But if we can kick off this week with a surge of grassroots support, we can build a movement big enough to clear these obstacles not only for me, but for lots of other young working-class champions.**

I need you to make a crucial choice in this moment:

-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, steal our Majority, and barge back into power...

clean_body: Youngkin might actually win | | | = | | Derek, Terry’s in trouble, and Trumpism is on the rise in Virginia. Don’t believe me? Just look at the polls! Almost every poll out of the Virginia Governor’s race has the election a statistical tie -- with Youngkin as little as two points down! I’ve looked at my fair share of polls before, Derek, and let me tell you -- a poll showing a beloved governor like Terry only two points up on an extremist Republican like Glenn Youngkin would have me sounding alarm bells. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I thought we were done with extremists like Glenn Youngkin in Virginia. Just last year we sent Donald Trump packing, but now his hand-picked candidate is on the rise. = \-- James Carville =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005032:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005033:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005034:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005035:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005031:6POIUZlBN:m:1:3253819041:9599946DF7EEAF40A8F2149B0ACF03A0:r)**

name: Mark, Campaign Manager
subject: Please remember these dates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Marco’s opponent announced she will do everything she can to APPEASE Chuck Schumer’s cries for power.
|

| | | **June 9, 2021:** Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings launches her campaign for Senate.

**June 27, 2021:** Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings actively calls to abolish the Filibuster.
**" It's time to eliminate the filibuster in the U.S. Senate" \- Val Demings**
**You read that right, Peter -- less than a month into her campaign, Marco's opponent announced she will do everything she can to APPEASE Chuck Schumer's cries for power.**
This statement comes as no surprise...Marco's opponent has consistently fallen in line with whatever Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Joe Biden want. Today, it's eliminating the filibuster for their own personal, political gain. But tomorrow, it could be eliminating every trace of the Trump legacy that Marco has worked hard to uphold.

The thing about statements like this, though, Peter, is that rich coastal elites see these and immediately empty their bank accounts into campaigns like Val's... and that's what I'm afraid of right now.

We were outraised in the Second Quarter and if Val continues to cozy up to the far-Left for monetary gain, it will give her a MASSIVE advantage.

With everything at stake, can I assure Marco that you confidently stand by him and chip in just $20 right now? I made a personalized link just for you so he gets notified immediately: **[https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/?personalized-link-for-Peter](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=4a82b83d27354946afd043683494378f&_e=Nhan0zJ8Jijy-Z9rZDjVB6oImJ8VbK2mvfNGP71lyk_yNibpNS-rBMfBtW6Ka2devD5lgOQ9XDDxsVuu5pNDhdphpuSpDeJ2hvV8JEyMsZXtzNDXNCHdi-s9mGW6PkCU5gW0kd9hz8xMnKnYEtecYIeNSkBnDNPAdtrSfq5hGlDKj9EV8FdBQ9TdQfjIrwhAliYKIf1rtueTAw9-j6bVTj8ZazWX93AffRkAqZrTN7dIk1AZTKW92eJgdI6RydgWzjygh73VfPti4nLSeYZTDHTwkXgnR3LctFIKOWQIbJr-rZjVxyHuNiV4fSI4VSSfRPYThZ64PhsnOeQRcHdhHjp5IeXQzS8XFwcCsSvTcfNT6TX_sSrNsnn99VYaCD7fZbA7cw6ZwqIwQq27SIMfYArlxXIrkiJqcGlSCFCbZOUMNsRf4TwA-CM9PJndlBQhO_i92XXD1MksEwl3hZBTTvaW9DC6UQzKhdlDhpTlERQwTdcDTneYTjIfo3Az0r58bz_iDIHaZjfA1KVsOzyxYVTJWZVfkh58KMeFDfuqtmo%3D "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/?personalized-link-for-Peter")**

Peter, turns out Dr. Fauci has some friends in big tech.

After I questioned him on his blatant lies about NIH funding for gain of function research, Google came after me! They took down my videos that detail the entire paper trail of Fauci's involvement with funding the Wuhan lab. They called it "medical misinformation!"
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005074:JIZP0ZlNc:m:1:3253819041:D75FA2C82C30181979DE8FF213FCA018:r)
This is ridiculous.

✅ I used basic NIH definitions of gain of function research.
✅ I provided documentation.
✅ I presented the facts.

**_And Google responds with ... censorship. _**

These are wild times, Peter. These big tech giants are willing to work as an arm of the federal government to protect the bureaucracy. **Free speech be damned.**

_Fighting for the truth has truly never been more difficult or more important._

And I need you fighting with me.

Please chip in today to fight this censorship and help me hold Dr. Fauci accountable: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2627905/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005074:JIZP0ZlNc:m:1:3253819041:D75FA2C82C30181979DE8FF213FCA018:r)**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

clean_body: | | | | | | = | | | Folks — Did you see Tawni's note last week? We're now only a few days away from the deadline for our July goal of $10,000 in grassroots donations. With right-wing Super PACs pouring millions into our state and attacking Ron with lies and misleading ads, it’s up to us to hold the line and take a stand for our shared Wisconsin values. = \- Team Kind | | | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tawni Kind Date: Tuesday, July 20, 2021 Subject: Why Goals Matter | | | | = Friend — I was hoping I wouldn't have to send this email. But as someone so important to our team, I always want you to know exactly where we stand. In an ideal scenario, we'd be exactly halfway to our critical $10,000 end-of-month goal by yesterday. = Here's where the July books stand as of 9:00 AM this morning: | = After running the numbers, I'm confident we can do this. If enough folks can go just a little above and beyond, we’ll be back on track and in position to go on offense against the onslaught of misleading ads targeting Ron and the dark dollars attacks already flooding Wisconsin. With less than two weeks left until our deadline, here's how we close this gap: If even half of the people reading this can chip in, we'll be back on track and headed toward a strong finish to propel us forward. = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = = | | = = | | | | = = | | = = | | | | = = | | = = | | | | There’s no doubt we can do this if we come together. We're counting on you now so Ron can hold this seat and continue fighting for Wisconsin families and the values we share. I can't express enough how much it means to have your support. Thank you for always doing your part to help Team Kind move Wisconsin forward. Sincerest thanks, Tawni Kind | | | | | | | = = | | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

name: Giffords.org
subject: A little behind
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends — we just have one question before the weekend comes to an end.
[**Will you make a $3 donation to help us put pressure on the Senate to vote on and pass universal background checks? Your support will go a long way towards helping us put the pressure on the Senate to save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210725-1-15&t=1&refcode2=384_3935704_ux4EQ6&akid=384%2E3935704%2Eux4EQ6)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210725-1-15&t=2&refcode2=384_3935704_ux4EQ6&akid=384%2E3935704%2Eux4EQ6)**
Your support couldn’t come at a more important time, friend. We’ve been crunching the numbers and we’re a little behind where we thought we’d be at this point in the month. It’s nothing we can’t make up for, but it’s especially important that we don’t fall too far behind, because Mitch McConnell and the NRA will be watching to see if our movement is losing steam.
We know we can get back on track with your help. So what do you say, friend?
**You can use the link below to make a donation today:**
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/July-Goal**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210725-1-15&t=3&refcode2=384_3935704_ux4EQ6&akid=384%2E3935704%2Eux4EQ6)
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=384%2E3935704%2Eux4EQ6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: I’m feeling discouraged
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm feeling discouraged.

My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.
| **MISSING RESPONSE: _[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005136:6zCNj9lNN:m:1:3253819041:E6E94840CCC33BE1DCFF2C1306DB6644:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_

CORRECT THE RECORD HERE:**
| | [I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005136:6zCNj9lNN:m:1:3253819041:E6E94840CCC33BE1DCFF2C1306DB6644:r "I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP")
---

I really hate to reach out once again, but radical Democrat PACs are ALREADY raising MILLIONS of dollars to beat me and we're just starting...Peter, **_Fox News_ said this might be the most expensive Senate race EVER & _CNN_ bumped me higher on their list of seats they think are likely to flip.** If I fall behind again I might not ever catch up.

| | [I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005136:6zCNj9lNN:m:1:3253819041:E6E94840CCC33BE1DCFF2C1306DB6644:r "I STAND WITH RUBIO & TRUMP")
---

If we don't win back the Senate, Chuck Schumer will pack the Supreme Court, pass sweeping gun control, get rid of the filibuster...the list goes on. The last Florida Senate race was decided by 0.1% & Roll Call listed my race as KEY for deciding control of the Senate. _**[I need you to take a stand with me, Peter, if I'm going to have any chance at winning this race.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005136:6zCNj9lNN:m:1:3253819041:E6E94840CCC33BE1DCFF2C1306DB6644:r "I need you to take a stand with me, Peter, if I’m going to have any chance at winning this race.")**_

Hope to see you on my list of supporters soon,

Marco Rubio

Look Derek, this election is coming up -- sooner than you realize.

And frankly, **_we’re blowing it._**

Glenn Youngkin is a GOP extremist who is funding his campaign with $75 million of his own personal fortune.

He’s promised to _defund_ Planned Parenthood, he _opposes_ Medicaid expansion, he’s _anti-_ LGBTQ+ and has _no interest_ in sensible gun legislation.

Not to mention, **he looks to Ted Cruz and Donald Trump as political mentors.**

It doesn’t make sense -- _**how can we be falling behind this guy?**_

We’ve only got 100 days left, Derek, and we _need_ to pick up the pace.

clean_body: We can’t let up now | | | = | | COUNTDOWN TO ELECTION DAY: 100 DAYS | = Look Derek, this election is coming up -- sooner than you realize. And frankly, we’re blowing it. Glenn Youngkin is a GOP extremist who is funding his campaign with $75 million of his own personal fortune. He’s promised to defund Planned Parenthood, he opposes Medicaid expansion, he’s anti- LGBTQ+ and has no interest in sensible gun legislation. Not to mention, he looks to Ted Cruz and Donald Trump as political mentors. It doesn’t make sense -- how can we be falling behind this guy? We’ve only got 100 days left, Derek, and we need to pick up the pace. = | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = We are literally counting down the days, Derek -- we don’t have much time to turn this ship around. name: Team Padilla
subject: we’ll keep this quick
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

We know it’s the weekend, so we’ll keep this quick.

Our online fundraising goal for this month is 5,000 individual donations
to defend Alex’s seat in the Senate. But with just one week remaining,
we’re only a little over halfway there.

That means we have a lot of work to do in the coming days, and we need
your help to get this campaign back on track.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210725-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=183_159979_jjLba0&akid=183%2E159979%2EjjLba0 ]So, what do you say? Can
you contribute
$3 today
to help us close the gap? Your donation will help ensure that we can keep
Alex’s critical seat in the Senate.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210725-1-15&t=1002&refcode2=183_159979_jjLba0&akid=183%2E159979%2EjjLba0 ]DONATE NOW

Look, you might think that the 2022 Election is a long ways
away.

But the reality is, our Senate majority is hanging on by a thread, and
Republicans are doing everything they can to make sure we lose it. From
organizing the recall in California, to stalling our progress in the
Senate by using the filibuster.

We’re under attack from all sides and the stakes could not be
higher.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210725-1-15&t=1003&refcode2=183_159979_jjLba0&akid=183%2E159979%2EjjLba0 ]So, if you’re able, can you make a
$3
donation to help us hit our 5,000 contribution July fundraising goal?
Every single donation sends a powerful message to Republicans that we’re
ready to fight back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210725-1-15&t=1004&refcode2=183_159979_jjLba0&akid=183%2E159979%2EjjLba0 ]DONATE NOW

Thank you so much for your continued support. We couldn’t do this without
you.

Team Padilla

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=183%2E159979%2EjjLba0

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: We didn’t raise as much as we’d hoped
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Yesterday, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally.
During the rally he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
It's clear he and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to take back this seat.
Now yesterday, we set a goal of raising $25,000 before Trump left the state to help fight back and keep Mark in the Senate. _But we didn’t raise as much as we’d hoped._
**We need to raise an additional $10,000 today to close the gap and get us in a better position to respond to the attacks that are coming our way from all angles.**
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210725-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1012_6688874_X0G-vx&akid=1012%2E6688874%2EX0G-vx)

| Peter,

My family and I have been having enjoying so many summer activities, and I'd love to share some of my favorite moments with you:
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TvGpbCAHAfASHNSmNTXP0BiYsuBMGOScORZW9i7i8JY=/i8HCjXQFSodbGYdwi1fz9Gru692FHl3YUO3z4eSxxq4=)
Here is the Spanberger crew on a family trip to DC! My husband, daughters, and I took a bike ride around Capitol Hill.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TvGpbCAHAfASHNSmNTXP0BiYsuBMGOScORZW9i7i8JY=/i8HCjXQFSodbGYdwi1fz9Gru692FHl3YUO3z4eSxxq4=)
Back in our district, I went tubing on Lake Anna... very shortly followed by swimming in Lake Anna!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TvGpbCAHAfASHNSmNTXP0BiYsuBMGOScORZW9i7i8JY=/i8HCjXQFSodbGYdwi1fz9Gru692FHl3YUO3z4eSxxq4=)
My daughters and I were so excited to participate in the Girl Scouts "I Am Becoming" event with Michelle Obama.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/TvGpbCAHAfASHNSmNTXP0BiYsuBMGOScORZW9i7i8JY=/i8HCjXQFSodbGYdwi1fz9Gru692FHl3YUO3z4eSxxq4=)
Earlier this month, my family and I attended a Nationals game. We took this photo right before a rain delay!

I have been sharing these photos along with other of my favorite summer moments on Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter. **I hope you 'll consider following along by following my accounts on social media, so you can keep up with me and my campaign, even after summer's over.**

body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Hi Peter, Since I was elected as your chair in March, we've gone across Indiana on our American Rescue Plan and American Jobs Plan Tours. Our team, current and former elected officials, party leaders, and allies are meeting Hoosiers where they are in counties small, medium and large to discuss the ways in which President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats are working to build a better Indiana. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Hi Peter, Since I was elected as your chair in March, we've gone across Indiana on our American Rescue Plan and American Jobs Plan Tours. Our team, current and former elected officials, party leaders, and allies are meeting Hoosiers where they are in counties small, medium and large to discuss the ways in which President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats are working to build a better Indiana. = We've been on the road a lot this summer and we've brought many new faces into our Party. But while Indiana Democrats should celebrate the historic achievements of President Biden, we must also commit to the hard work of rebuilding our own state party and giving Hoosiers a balanced government at every level and in every community. = The support of our monthly recurring donors allows us to hire new staff, host more events, build a large statewide organizing program, and build momentum across Indiana. All of this creates the infrastructure that Democratic candidates need to be able to run successfully all over the state. We recognize that if we want to take back the Statehouse and beat Todd Young in 2022 we need to start moving right now. Without your monthly contributions, none of these changes would be possible. If we can add another $3250 in monthly donations to our fundraising sources, I am confident that we will have the financial resources we need as we move into campaign season. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Sign the petition: The Senate must pass the Recovering America’s Wildlife Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Can I count on your support? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32974589/297450838/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210725_X_PET_WC_X_NO_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjhmZTFiOC05MWVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b174YMHBV2k5abHRGWsKa7DWB2UTn2fAysjYcGAMsg8=&emci=b900304c-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf8fe1b8-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Teddy Roosevelt once said: "The wildlife and its habitat cannot speak, so we must and we will.” These words are especially important to remember as one-third of fish and wildlife species are at increased risk of extinction in the U.S. alone. Let’s be clear: Protecting fish and wildlife means protecting the future of our lands and water, and our way of life. It’s all at risk if we don’t act fast to address the wildlife crisis. I’ve introduced the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ in the U.S. Senate to make sure states, territories, and Tribes have the funding they need to carry out wildlife conservation efforts and prevent more species from endangerment. [**In this pivotal moment, will you sign the petition in support of the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32974590/297450839/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210725_X_PET_WC_X_NO_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjhmZTFiOC05MWVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b174YMHBV2k5abHRGWsKa7DWB2UTn2fAysjYcGAMsg8=&emci=b900304c-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf8fe1b8-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32974591/297450840/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210725_X_PET_WC_X_NO_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjhmZTFiOC05MWVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b174YMHBV2k5abHRGWsKa7DWB2UTn2fAysjYcGAMsg8=&emci=b900304c-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf8fe1b8-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Enjoying the great outdoors and appreciating our wildlife is part of who I am. I know so many of you feel the same. So we should all be concerned that we don’t have enough resources to protect our wildlife and their habitats right now. Our current federal funding is _**less than 5 percent**_ of what’s required to conserve species in need of protection.
Thankfully, the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ would change that. It would also create lots of good-paying jobs every year and fund Tribal wildlife conservation programs.
[**Can I count on your support of this deeply important bill? Sign the petition if you’re ready to see the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ at work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32974592/297450841/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210725_X_PET_WC_X_NO_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjhmZTFiOC05MWVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b174YMHBV2k5abHRGWsKa7DWB2UTn2fAysjYcGAMsg8=&emci=b900304c-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf8fe1b8-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32974593/297450842/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210725_X_PET_WC_X_NO_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjhmZTFiOC05MWVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b174YMHBV2k5abHRGWsKa7DWB2UTn2fAysjYcGAMsg8=&emci=b900304c-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf8fe1b8-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---

Thank you for all you do,
—Team Heinrich
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32974594/297450843/1737618405?refcode=MTH_em_20210725_X_PET_WC_X_NO_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjhmZTFiOC05MWVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b174YMHBV2k5abHRGWsKa7DWB2UTn2fAysjYcGAMsg8=&emci=b900304c-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bf8fe1b8-91ed-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045). Peter, turns out Dr. Fauci has some friends in big tech.

After I questioned him on his blatant lies about NIH funding for gain of function research, Google came after me! They took down my videos that detail the entire paper trail of Fauci's involvement with funding the Wuhan lab. They called it "medical misinformation!"
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005313:683K89lNd:m:1:3253819041:B6FF3AB6A89F17627C4BD0018234C15D:r)
This is ridiculous.

✅ I used basic NIH definitions of gain of function research.
✅ I provided documentation.
✅ I presented the facts.

**_And Google responds with ... censorship. _**

These are wild times, Peter. These big tech giants are willing to work as an arm of the federal government to protect the bureaucracy. **Free speech be damned.**

_Fighting for the truth has truly never been more difficult or more important._

And I need you fighting with me.

Please chip in today to fight this censorship and help me hold Dr. Fauci accountable: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2627905/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005313:683K89lNd:m:1:3253819041:B6FF3AB6A89F17627C4BD0018234C15D:r)**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California's 22nd District against Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who has turned his back on Central Valley families for two decades. name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from the beginning.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)

[**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005385:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005386:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005387:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005388:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58005384:6S-Hk9lN_:m:1:3253819041:0EE9DECC27B3ED3D8E1825239DDDA36F:r)**

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: I need to speak with you today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Peter --

I know you've heard a lot from our campaign lately, so before I ask you to make a small donation toward our end-of-month fundraising deadline, I wanted to explain what it truly means to be a grassroots donor of this campaign:

Since we launched our campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, thousands of supporters across our state (including folks in every one of our 72 counties!) have joined our movement to replace Ron Johnson and give Wisconsin workers and families the leadership they deserve.

When you choose to make a donation to our campaign, you're sending an important message to Republicans like Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and their powerful friends that we won't allow them to buy this Senate seat -- and you're proving wrong the notion that only the wealthy few and corporate interests get to have a say in Washington.

But it's not just that. When you pitch in a few hard-earned dollars here and there, you're fueling our campaign for the long haul and allowing us to prepare for the fights ahead. That's critical in a race as competitive and expensive as this one will be -- especially since I have refused to take any money from corporate PACs. I'm relying on folks like you.

While every deadline is important, this one is especially so. It will be the first one since a major election forecaster changed our race rating from Lean Republican to Toss-Up and since we found out Ron Johnson outraised every Democrat in this race last quarter. With our race heating up, I need your help to put our campaign in a position to succeed.

**If you're with me in this fight, I would really appreciate it if you would add a donation toward our end-of-month deadline. We are setting a goal of reaching 10,000 grassroots donors over the next few days, and I hope I can count on you to be one of them. Every dollar will go toward building a winning campaign you can be proud of.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32978710/297470596/-1598864484?gpsid=50_130_19889&refcode=em21_210725_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210725_EOM1_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDg2NTI5Yi1hOGVkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6P6KwmHCzXNW0rlXTMlD50JFAawxX-JAWHNV2bJDVA=)

clean_body: Peter -- I know you've heard a lot from our campaign lately, so before I ask you to make a small donation toward our end-of-month fundraising deadline, I wanted to explain what it truly means to be a grassroots donor of this campaign: Since we launched our campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, thousands of supporters across our state (including folks in every one of our 72 counties!) have joined our movement to replace Ron Johnson and give Wisconsin workers and families the leadership they deserve. When you choose to make a donation to our campaign, you're sending an important message to Republicans like Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and their powerful friends that we won't allow them to buy this Senate seat -- and you're proving wrong the notion that only the wealthy few and corporate interests get to have a say in Washington. But it's not just that. When you pitch in a few hard-earned dollars here and there, you're fueling our campaign for the long haul and allowing us to prepare for the fights ahead. That's critical in a race as competitive and expensive as this one will be -- especially since I have refused to take any money from corporate PACs. I'm relying on folks like you. While every deadline is important, this one is especially so. It will be the first one since a major election forecaster changed our race rating from Lean Republican to Toss-Up and since we found out Ron Johnson outraised every Democrat in this race last quarter. With our race heating up, I need your help to put our campaign in a position to succeed. If you're with me in this fight, I would really appreciate it if you would add a donation toward our end-of-month deadline. We are setting a goal of reaching 10,000 grassroots donors over the next few days, and I hope I can count on you to be one of them. Every dollar will go toward building a winning campaign you can be proud of. Friend,
